headline: StubHub Stock Plunges. Shaky Earnings Guidance Isn’t the Only Problem.
summary: StubHub  stock was tumbling on Thursday after a disappointing fourth-quarter earnings report piled on the misery for the ticketing marketplace.  StubHub posted a wider-than-expected loss and issued soft earnings guidance after Wednesday’s close, failing to reassure investors who were already fretting about regulators cracking down on ticket resale sites.  Lawmakers in California and New York have introduced legislation proposing a cap on resale ticket prices.

headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock to Research Further and 2 We Brush Off
summary: While the S&P 500 (^GSPC) includes industry leaders, not every stock in the index is a winner. Some companies are past their prime, weighed down by poor execution, weak financials, or structural headwinds.
